title: From Sun to Home Electricity
question: How does sunlight become useful electricity at home?
explanation: This pathway shows how solar energy becomes electricity, enters the grid and supports everyday life.
challenge: Explain why solar panels alone are not enough without grids, storage or smart energy management.

title: From Wind to City Power
question: How does wind support cleaner electricity for cities?
explanation: This pathway traces how moving air becomes electrical power that supports urban life.
challenge: Compare wind energy with solar energy. What makes each one stronger or weaker in different places?

title: From Coal to Climate Change
question: How does coal use contribute to climate change?
explanation: This pathway helps students trace the chain from fossil fuel use to environmental impact.
challenge: Explain why this is not only a science issue, but also a social and policy issue.

title: Why Batteries Matter
question: Why does battery storage matter in renewable energy systems?
explanation: This pathway shows why storage helps match renewable supply with real energy demand.
challenge: Describe one situation where renewable energy would be wasted without storage.

title: A Sustainable School Energy Plan
question: How can a school become more energy sustainable?
explanation: This pathway turns energy learning into a practical design challenge for students.
challenge: Choose one building improvement and explain how it reduces both cost and environmental impact.
